---
title: gemini paper
bibliography: germanic-ai.bib
warning: false
date: '`r format(Sys.time())`'

# foot: the anarkkiv lankalevikki worksheet collection >> <https://ada-sub.dh-index.org/blog>
# format:
# html:
#     theme:
#       - cosmo #litera
#       - brand
#     #mainfont: Courier
#     monofont: Menlo
#     #font: Courier
#     css: styles.css
#     toc: true
#     number-sections: true
#     toc-depth: 3
#     include-in-header:
#       text: |
#         <!-- HTML simply prints the inner text -->
#         <!-- 16482.snc -->
#         <script type="application/latex">
#         \newcommand{\he}[1]{#1}
#         </script>
#         <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css">
#         <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://esteeschwarz.github.io/DC-LX/assets/css/icons.css">

# pdf:
#       keep-tex: true
#     #   template: pdf-template.tex
#     #   latex_engine: xelatex  # default lualatex
#     #   latex-tinytex: false

#       fig-pos: "H" # Forces images to appear exactly where they are included
#     #   mainfont: 'Free Sans'
#       font-size: 11
#       colorlinks: true
#       include-in-header: 
#         - ../assets/lualoani.tex
#         - ../assets/footer-header.tex
#       include-before-body: ../assets/go-head.tex
#         # - paper.tex
#         #   pdf-engine: lualatex
#     #   header-includes:
#     #     - \newcommand{\docfoot}{$params.foot$}
#     #     - \newcommand{\docmeta}{$meta$}

# meta: |
#   class: [16838] germanische sprachen im vergleich  
#   tutor: hüning/konvicka   
#   term: WS25/26  

# filters:
#   - ../assets/commands.lua
#   - ../assets/luaipa.lua
# logoleft: ../assets/fadenlogo-fwb.png
# logoright: ../assets/dcl-head-niemand.png
---

{{< include _vars.qmd >}}

# index
## snc
- 16144.1.pdf
- wks. no fro q.yml
- no.

### 16145.
- from parent qyml

{{< include _gemini-A-ul.md >}}
{{< include _gemini-B-methods-2.qmd >}}
